# FairClash Tournaments

> A mobile esports platform by Fair Fun Studios where players compete in skill-based games, join tournaments, win real cash prizes, and withdraw via UPI.

FairClash hosts a library of casual and competitive games (Aviator Crash, Ludo, Snake, Sudoku, Memory, Tic Tac Toe, Doodle Jump, Quiz, Sports Prediction). Players deposit via UPI (min ₹50), play tournaments and head-to-head matches, and withdraw winnings (min ₹100, 40% platform commission). The platform includes social features (follow, chat, leaderboards) and an in-app AI assistant.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Featured tournaments, banners, and quick access to games.
- [Games](/games): Full library of games available on the platform.
- [Tournaments](/tournaments): Upcoming, live, and completed tournaments with entry fees and prize pools.
- [Leaderboard](/leaderboard): Global, weekly, and monthly rankings with podium for top 3.
- [Store](/store): Purchasable themes and cosmetics.
- [Social](/social): Friend feed, follows, and activity stream.
- [Rules](/rules): Gameplay, deposit, withdrawal, and fair-play rules.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy and data handling.

## Games

- [Aviator Crash](/aviator): Place a bet, cash out before the multiplier crashes.
- [Ludo](/ludo): Multiplayer board game with matchmaking.
- [Snake](/snake): Classic snake arcade.
- [Sudoku](/sudoku): Number puzzle.
- [Memory](/memory): Card matching memory game.
- [Tic Tac Toe](/tic-tac-toe): Two-player classic.
- [Doodle Jump](/doodle-jump): Vertical platformer.
- [Quiz](/quiz): Trivia game.
- [Sports Prediction](/sports): Predict outcomes of real sports events.

## Optional

- [Search](/search): Find users by username.
